title: Durability Digits
description: Replace the vague colored bar with numerical data, giving you the exact information you need to keep your gear safe.
body:
## Description Replace vague colored bars with precise numerical data. Durability Digits provides an accurate overlay for your gear, ensuring you know exactly when your items are about to break. ### Features * **Numerical Overlays** – Displays exact remaining durability directly on item icons. * **Smart Formatting** – Automatically condenses large numbers (e.g., 1.5k, 2.1m) to maintain a clean and readable UI. * **Percentage Mode** – Toggle between raw durability values and percentages with optional decimal precision. * **Extensive Customization** – Tweak every visual detail via the in-game menu: * **Positioning** – Offset text to any corner or center of the item slot. * **Vanilla Bar** – Choose to keep the original durability bar or hide it for a minimalist look. * **Visuals** – Switch between dynamic colors (matching the item's damage state) or static white text. * **Quick Toggle** – Assign a customizable keybind to instantly enable or disable the overlay. ## Compatibility
Category Support
MC Versions 1.21-1.21.8, 26.1.x
Maintenance Latest version only (26.1.x)
Loaders Fabric (Official), Quilt (Compatible)
## Dependencies
